item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 10s 𝗡𝗜𝗝𝗠𝗔𝗡 𝗣𝗨𝗡𝗜𝗦𝗛𝗘𝗦 𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗕𝗨𝗟𝗟𝗘𝗧
Wessel Nijman strides into his third European Tour quarter-final of the year following a 6-3 win over Stephen Bunting - who squandered 13 darts at doubles. Wessel Nijman

philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 3min 'I decided it wasn’t for me at the previously agreed rate, it was nothing more than that.'

item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 3min NIJMAN PREVAILS!
Wessel Nijman is through to the quarter-finals of the European Darts Gra
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 3min NIJMAN PREVAILS!
Wessel Nijman is through to the quarter-finals of the European Darts Grand Prix, following a no-frills 6-3 victory over Stephen Bunting!
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #ET5 1 2 12 2 mil
